potion of healing.name: potion of healing
potion of healing.effect: Restores HP. Blessed: full heal. Cursed: reduces max HP.

potion of full healing.name: potion of full healing
potion of full healing.effect: Fully restores HP and raises max HP.

potion of speed.name: potion of speed
potion of speed.effect: Grants fast speed temporarily (or permanently if blessed).
potion of speed.notes: Use when fleeing or in combat. keys:q,<letter>

potion of object detection.name: potion of object detection
potion of object detection.effect: Reveals all items on current level including stairs.
potion of object detection.notes: USE THIS to find stairs down (>). Extremely valuable. keys:q,<letter>

potion of paralysis.name: potion of paralysis
potion of paralysis.notes: DANGEROUS. Do NOT drink. Can throw at enemies.

potion of confusion.name: potion of confusion
potion of confusion.notes: DANGEROUS. Do NOT drink unless intentional.

scroll of teleportation.name: scroll of teleportation
scroll of teleportation.effect: Teleports you to random location on current level.
scroll of teleportation.notes: Useful escape. Cursed: confuses instead. keys:r,<letter>

scroll of magic mapping.name: scroll of magic mapping
scroll of magic mapping.effect: Reveals entire current level map including unexplored areas.
scroll of magic mapping.notes: USE THIS if you can't find stairs. Reveals all rooms and corridors. keys:r,<letter>

scroll of light.name: scroll of light
scroll of light.notes: Use in dark rooms to reveal layout. keys:r,<letter>

wand of secret door detection.name: wand of secret door detection
wand of secret door detection.effect: Reveals all secret doors and passages on current level.
wand of secret door detection.notes: USE THIS when you can't find stairs or exits. Zap in any direction. keys:z,<letter>,<direction>. Direction keys: k=north j=south h=west l=east

wand of cancellation.name: wand of cancellation
wand of cancellation.effect: Cancels monster special abilities. Also cancels your own items if aimed at self.
wand of cancellation.notes: Useful against monsters with special attacks. Do NOT zap at yourself. keys:z,<letter>,<direction>

ring of conflict.name: ring of conflict
ring of conflict.effect: Causes all nearby monsters to fight each other instead of you.
ring of conflict.notes: Extremely powerful. Put on immediately. keys:P,<letter>

ring of regeneration.name: ring of regeneration
ring of regeneration.notes: Put on when HP is low and you need to recover. keys:P,<letter>

ring of polymorph control.name: ring of polymorph control
ring of polymorph control.effect: Lets you choose your form when polymorphed.
ring of polymorph control.notes: Advanced use. Keep in inventory for now.

spellbook of magic missile.name: spellbook of magic missile
spellbook of magic missile.notes: Read to learn spell. keys:r,<letter>. Then cast with keys:Z,<spell_letter>

spellbook of force bolt.name: spellbook of force bolt
spellbook of force bolt.effect: Teaches force bolt spell (ranged attack, hits boulders).
spellbook of force bolt.notes: Read to learn. Can push boulders with force bolt. keys:r,<letter>
